[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1001110 4
1 1100101 4
2 0110111 5
3 1000111 4
4 0000000 a
5 0110010 3
6 0110000 2
7 0100000 1

01 10 0110010 3 match 5
12 21 0110000 2 match 6
23 32 0100000 1 match 7
34 43 0001000 1
45 54 1000100 2
56 65 0100101 3
67 76 0000111 3
70 07 1000011 3

13 31 0100000 1 match 7
24 42 0000000 a match 4
35 53 0100000 1 match 7

57 75 1000101 3
60 06 0110011 4
71 17 0000110 2

47 74 1000110 3
50 05 1100001 3
61 16 0110110 4
72 27 0000001 1

37 73 0000000 a match 4
